name: Dialog
description: Modal dialog with overlay, supporting controlled and uncontrolled states. Includes focus trapping and escape key handling.

defaultOpen.description: Default open state for uncontrolled usage

examples.name: Basic dialog
examples.code:
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button>Open Dialog</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Dialog Title</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This is a description.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogBody>Content here</DialogBody>
    <DialogFooter>
      <DialogClose asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      </DialogClose>
      <Button variant="primary">Confirm</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
